message.content:
LDN _HtrErr
ANDN WTS
AND (HtrTmr.Q
OR _Htr
AND _WTS
)
S HtrErr
LD _HtrErr
AND PBStop
R HtrErr
LDN _MtrErr
ANDN MS
AND (MtrTmr.Q
OR _Mtr
AND _MS
)
S MtrErr
LD _MtrErr
AND PBStop
R MtrErr
LDN _MxIsBd
AND LS0
AND _EVlv
AND _C2InMx
ANDN _MxIsFn
S MxIsBd
LD _MxIsBd
ANDN LS0
R MxIsBd
LDN _MxIsFn
AND LS0
ANDN MxIsBd
AND MixTmr.Q
S MxIsFn
LD _MxIsFn
ANDN LS0
R MxIsFn
LD _Compl
ANDN _Vlv1
ANDN LS0
OR HtrErr
OR MtrErr
OR MxIsBd
OR SBEVlv
OR PBStop
OR (NOT TS1
ANDN LS1
ANDN MxIsFn
)
OR (NOT TS2
ANDN LS2
ANDN MxIsFn
)
ST Fin
LDN _SysOn
AND PBStrt
ANDN Fin
S SysOn
LD _SysOn
AND Fin
R SysOn
LDN _Htr
AND SysOn
ANDN LTS
S Htr
LD _Htr
AND (NOT SysOn
OR UTS
)
R Htr
LD SysOn
AND TS1
ANDN LS1
ANDN C2InMx
AND WTS
ST Vlv1
LD SysOn
AND TS2
AND LS1
ANDN LS2
ANDN MxIsFn
AND WTS
ST Vlv2
LD SysOn
AND C1InMx
AND C2InMx
AND LS2
ANDN MxIsFn
AND WTS
ST Mtr
LD SysOn
AND MxIsFn
AND WTS
ST PVlv
LD SBEVlv
ST EVlv
LD Htr
ANDN WTS
ST HtrTmr.IN
LD Mtr
ANDN MS
ST MtrTmr.IN
LD Mtr
AND MS
ST MixTmr.IN
